testcase.name: @BeforeClass setup
testcase.failure: org.openqa.selenium.SessionNotCreatedException: Could not start a new session. Response code 500. Message: Could not start a new session. Error while creating session with the driver service. Stopping driver service: Could not start a new session. Response code 500. Message: session not created: This version of ChromeDriver only supports Chrome version 131 Current browser version is 148.0.7778.179 with binary path C:\Program Files\Google\Chrome\Application\chrome.exe Host info: host: 'SRINIVAS', ip: '192.168.1.3' Build info: version: '4.43.0', revision: 'dd0f534' System info: os.name: 'Windows 11', os.arch: 'amd64', os.version: '10.0', java.version: '17.0.12' Driver info: driver.version: unknown Build info: version: '4.43.0', revision: 'dd0f534' System info: os.name: 'Windows 11', os.arch: 'amd64', os.version: '10.0', java.version: '17.0.12' Driver info: driver.version: unknown Build info: version: '4.44.0', revision: 'da2039b' System info: os.name: 'Windows 11', os.arch: 'amd64', os.version: '10.0', java.version: '17.0.12' Driver info: org.openqa.selenium.remote.RemoteWebDriver Command: [null, newSession {capabilities=[Capabilities {browserName: chrome, platformName: Windows 11}]}] Capabilities {browserName: chrome, platformName: Windows 11} at org.openqa.selenium.remote.ProtocolHandshake.createSession(ProtocolHandshake.java:115) at org.openqa.selenium.remote.ProtocolHandshake.createSession(ProtocolHandshake.java:76) at org.openqa.selenium.remote.ProtocolHandshake.createSession(ProtocolHandshake.java:62) at org.openqa.selenium.remote.HttpCommandExecutor.execute(HttpCommandExecutor.java:196) at org.openqa.selenium.remote.TracedCommandExecutor.execute(TracedCommandExecutor.java:53) at org.openqa.selenium.remote.RemoteWebDriver.execute(RemoteWebDriver.java:600) at org.openqa.selenium.remote.RemoteWebDriver.startSession(RemoteWebDriver.java:284) at org.openqa.selenium.remote.RemoteWebDriver.<init>(RemoteWebDriver.java:217) at org.openqa.selenium.remote.RemoteWebDriver.<init>(RemoteWebDriver.java:176) at org.openqa.selenium.remote.RemoteWebDriver.<init>(RemoteWebDriver.java:172) at testBase.BaseClass.setup(BaseClass.java:72) at java.base/java.util.ArrayList.forEach(ArrayList.java:1511) ... Removed 25 stack frames

testcase.name: @BeforeClass setup
testcase.failure: org.openqa.selenium.SessionNotCreatedException: Could not start a new session. Response code 500. Message: Could not start a new session. Error while creating session with the driver service. Stopping driver service: Could not start a new session. Response code 500.
